about.title: Models that drive coordination, not the other way around.
body: Building Information Modeling is the spine of our delivery. We build parametric Revit models at the LOD appropriate to each phase — LOD 200 for design development, LOD 300–350 for documentation, LOD 400 for prefabrication coordination.

Our coordination workflow runs through Navisworks for clash detection, with prioritized issue logs and a shared 3D viewer so MEP, structural, and architectural teams resolve conflicts in the model before drawings are issued.
Beyond the geometry, we deliver structured data exports — COBie spreadsheets, IFC files, and parameter mappings — that feed into the owner's facility management platform on day one of operations.
highlights: COBie + IFC exports for FM handover
